dimension_scores.label: Problem fit
dimension_scores.rationale: Kafka is purpose-built for high-throughput event streaming and handles 10M+ events/day natively with Schema Registry meeting the evolution constraint.

dimension_scores.label: Ecosystem maturity
dimension_scores.rationale: De-facto industry standard with 10+ years of production use, large community, and enterprise support from Confluent.

dimension_scores.label: Total cost of ownership
dimension_scores.rationale: Confluent Cloud at this scale typically runs $1,500-$3,000/month, comfortably within the $5k budget.

dimension_scores.label: Operational overhead
dimension_scores.rationale: Fully managed cluster, Schema Registry, and connectors reduce operational burden significantly.

dimension_scores.label: Risk and lock-in
dimension_scores.rationale: Confluent-specific features (ksqlDB, Tiered Storage) create moderate vendor dependency.

dimension_scores.label: Skill match
dimension_scores.rationale: Kafka expertise is widely available; most platform engineers have prior exposure.
